description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("Cruise AV"), operating in manual mode, was at a complete stop in response to a red light on southbound 
Drumm Street between Clay Street and Sacramento Street. A Ford Mustang approaching from the rear made contact with the Cruise AV's 
rear bumper. The Cruise AV operator reported injuries. There were no damages reported and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
